title: Phase II Study for Previously Untreated Subjects With Non Small Cell Lung Cancer (NSCLC) or Small Cell Lung Cancer (SCLC)
condition:
Lung Cancer
Small Cell Lung Cancer
Carcinoma, Non-Small-Cell Lung,
inclusion_criteria:
Documented NSCLC or SCLC

ECOG of 0 or 1
exclusion_criteria:
�� Brain metastases
�� Autoimmune disease
�� Known HIV, Hep B or Hep C infection
�� Peripheral neuropathy ≥ grade 2
locations: Department of Medical Oncology   Nizam's Institute of Medical Sciences
Dept. of Medical Oncology                Shirdi Sai Baba Cancer Hospital    KMC, Manipal
Dept. of Medical Oncology Christian Medical College              Vellore
GI and Lung Cancer Division          Regional Cancer Institute
